title: Wiltz, Wiltz Canton — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Wiltz, Wiltz Canton: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Wiltz is a city in Wiltz Canton with a population of 7,100. A picturesque town in the Luxembourg Ardennes, known for its medieval castle, the Wiltz Festival, and its role as a center for the local brewing industry.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
